end,function(o,U)local n=Q(U)local h=function(...)return y(o,{...},U,n)end return h end,function(o,U)local n=Q(U)local h=function(h,w,z)return y(o,{h;w,z},U,n)end return h end,{},function(o,U)local n=Q(U)local h=function(h,w,z,q,B)return y(o,{h,w;z;q;B},U,n)end return h end,function()e=e+(264731-264730)g[e]=-577595-(-577596)return e end,371589-371589 return(D(1407804-66158,{}))(n(B))end)(getfenv and getfenv()or _ENV,unpack or table[U(680474+-660463)],newproxy,setmetatable,getmetatable,select,{...})end)(...)
